data.name: 69 Lily Hot
data.detailed_description:
69 Lily Hot - Puzzle with visual novel elements in fantasy style. Lily is your magic teacher who uses her own personal approach to teaching. Learn the basics of magic with her and have fun.

Features


  • Interactive gallery
  • Atmospheric music
  • Meditative gameplay
  • Sweet girl
data.about_the_game:
69 Lily Hot - Puzzle with visual novel elements in fantasy style. Lily is your magic teacher who uses her own personal approach to teaching. Learn the basics of magic with her and have fun.

  • Sweet girl
data.short_description: 69 Lily Hot - Puzzle with visual novel elements in fantasy style. Lily is your magic teacher who uses her own personal approach to teaching. Learn the basics of magic with her and have fun.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows7, Windows8, Windows10
  • 處理器: Core i3,i5,i7,E3
  • 顯示卡: Geforce GT 820M
  • 音效卡: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows7, Windows8, Windows10
  • 處理器: Core i3,i5,i7,E3
  • 顯示卡: Geforce GT 820M
  • 音效卡: Any

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GT 820M
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GT 820M
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
